lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, used to validate the multipurpose loadout, hardpoint fit and power budget.

sources.label: EDSY
sources.what: Alternate outfitting planner, used to cross-check jump range, shield strength and mass on the engineered fit.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Panther Clipper Mk II ship page — manufacturer specs, hull figures, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Hardpoint sizes, optional-internal slot layout, hull mass and engineering blueprint data behind the multipurpose fit.

sources.label: Inara — Panther Clipper Mk II
sources.what: Ship-specific stats, internal capacity and shipyard pricing.

sources.label: Fandom — Panther Clipper Mk II
sources.what: Lore, freighter role and the hull's spec reference informing its multipurpose suitability.
